욥기 22:2.content: “Can a man be profitable to God? Surely he who is wise is profitable to himself.

욥기 22:3.content: Is it any pleasure to the Almighty that you are righteous? Or does it benefit him that you make your ways perfect?

욥기 22:4.content: Is it for your piety that he reproves you, that he enters with you into judgment?

욥기 22:5.content: Isn’t your wickedness great? Neither is there any end to your iniquities.

욥기 22:6.content: For you have taken pledges from your brother for nothing, and stripped the naked of their clothing.

욥기 22:7.content: You haven’t given water to the weary to drink, and you have withheld bread from the hungry.

욥기 22:8.content: But as for the mighty man, he had the earth. The honorable man, he lived in it.

욥기 22:9.content: You have sent widows away empty, and the arms of the fatherless have been broken.

욥기 22:10.content: Therefore snares are around you. Sudden fear troubles you,

욥기 22:11.content: or darkness, so that you can not see, and floods of waters cover you.

욥기 22:12.content: “Isn’t God in the heights of heaven? See the height of the stars, how high they are!

욥기 22:13.content: You say, ‘What does God know? Can he judge through the thick darkness?

욥기 22:14.content: Thick clouds are a covering to him, so that he doesn’t see. He walks on the vault of the sky.’

욥기 22:15.content: Will you keep the old way, which wicked men have trodden,

욥기 22:16.content: who were snatched away before their time, whose foundation was poured out as a stream,

욥기 22:17.content: who said to God, ‘Depart from us;’ and, ‘What can the Almighty do for us?’

욥기 22:18.content: Yet he filled their houses with good things, but the counsel of the wicked is far from me.

욥기 22:19.content: The righteous see it, and are glad. The innocent ridicule them,

욥기 22:20.content: saying, ‘Surely those who rose up against us are cut off. The fire has consumed their remnant.’

욥기 22:21.content: “Acquaint yourself with him, now, and be at peace. By it, good will come to you.

욥기 22:22.content: Please receive instruction from his mouth, and lay up his words in your heart.

욥기 22:23.content: If you return to the Almighty, you will be built up, if you put away unrighteousness far from your tents.

욥기 22:24.content: Lay your treasure in the dust, the gold of Ophir among the stones of the brooks.

욥기 22:25.content: The Almighty will be your treasure, and precious silver to you.

욥기 22:26.content: For then you will delight yourself in the Almighty, and will lift up your face to God.

욥기 22:27.content: You will make your prayer to him, and he will hear you. You will pay your vows.

욥기 22:28.content: You will also decree a thing, and it will be established to you. Light will shine on your ways.

욥기 22:29.content: When they cast down, you will say, ‘be lifted up.’ He will save the humble person.

욥기 22:30.content: He will even deliver him who is not innocent. Yes, he will be delivered through the cleanness of your hands.”
